case_title: DIAMOND STATE INSURANCE COMPANY VS. FRANKLIN AUTO BODY et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS RETURNED FILED BY PLAINTIFF DIAMOND STATE INSURANCE COMPANY

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DIAMOND STATE INSURANCE COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COSOVIC, ANA $500.00 PRINCIPAL, $193.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $693.50, SEE SCANNED DOC

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-11-2004 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT LOUIS MARTINEZ, AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S) OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST DEFENDANT(S) . THE JUN-25-2004 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DIAMOND STATE INSURANCE COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT FRANKLIN AUTO BODY COSOVIC, ANA MARTINEZ, LOUIS DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JUN-25-2004 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-23-2004 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JUN-10-2004
DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT FRANKLIN AUTO BODY
